locations.name: 玻利維亞

locations.name: 巴西

relations.subject: White-eared puffbird
relations.evidence: It is found in Argentina, Bolivia, Brazil, Paraguay and Peru, where it inhabits tropical and subtropical dry forests, subtropical and tropical moist forests, gallery forests, tropical savanna, and heavily degraded former forest
